description.ko: 반투명한 생물학적 막을 통해 빛과 생명이 리드미컬하게 교환되는 유기적 생명력을 표현한 작품입니다.
description.en: A representation of organic vitality, depicting the rhythmic exchange of light and life through translucent biological membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Osmotic Pulse.' A monumental respiratory node constructed from #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular structures, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid medium. Rhythmic pulsations exhale thick, luminous ribbons of #FFE66D golden liquid light that weave through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro focus on internal capillary systems and glowing sap channels. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
